When you're running on empty, you can't be yourself. Try oven-baked Ritz Crackers Original, the ideal crowd pleaser for any occasion. Everyone Loves a Ritz Fix.

If you're looking for the perfect snack to eat on it's own, top your Charcuterie board or pair with your favourite cheese, dip, or entertaining with family & friends, and want a platter that will steal the show, Ritz is your perfect accompaniment. Top your cheeseboard with crackers, dips, slices of your tastiest block & soft cheeses, and a pop of fresh with fruit and vegetables and you'll have everyone covered. If you are feeling fancy, you can also create the perfect finger food for your party with Ritz cracker appetisers. Or if you'd like, eat straight from the packet!

Oven Baked

Buttery, Crispy

The only thing you need to worry about is whether there’ll be enough to go around!

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Need lunchbox fillers? Snack Mix Chips Lunchbox Snacks Assorted Multipack is a delicious and convenient solution for family snacking. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
A Multipack of Fan-favourites!We’ve gathered all of our most popular potato chip varieties into one convenient Snack Mix Variety Multipack that is sure to offer everybody’s favourite flavour sensation. After selecting only the best Australian-grown produce, we slice, cook and season them to produce the highest quality potato and corn chips that have become synonymous with Aussie gatherings. Then it’s just a matter of adding the classic flavours you’ve grown up with and make them readily available in one place.

Perfect as Lunchbox Snacks
The Smith's Chips Snack Mix Variety Multipack is ideal for those on-the-go looking for lip-smacking snacks. With the huge potato chip variety awaiting you inside, the multipack offers the perfect school lunch snacks for even the pickiest eaters. Even the big kids can enjoy Smith’s as a lunchtime snack at their desk during office hours, or even when the kids aren’t looking!

Craving Crunching Chips Ready for Any Occasion
If you’re trying to find the ultimate crowd-pleaser for your next event, the Smith's Chips Snack Mix Variety Multipack will satisfy the cravings of all your family and friends. They’re the perfect mixed snacks to bring along to your next outdoor activity when the going gets tough, or as a little treat during the quiet hours of a holiday gathering.

Australian Snack Roulette
Pick out your favourite flavour in Smith’s Multipack, or play Australian Snack Roulette by closing your eyes and taking a gamble. Bring some excitement to your snack time by putting your tastebud’s fate into the hands of chance! Don’t hesitate, step on up to Smith’s own wheel of fortune.

A Huge Potato Chips Variety
Each Snack Mix contains:
- 5 x Grain Waves Sour Cream & Chives Flavoured Wholegrain Chips
- 5 x Smith's Original Crinkle Cut Potato Chips
- 5 x Doritos Cheese Supreme Flavoured Corn Chips
- 5 x Twisties Cheese Flavoured Snacks


Snack time choices just became harder with the delicious flavours competing for your attention in Smith’s Chips Snack Mix Variety Multipack.

Made in Australia from only the best ingredients, and cooked to crispy perfection.

At only 106 calories or less per serving, you can eat away to your heart’s content.

Take a walk on the wild side by spinning the wheel and letting fate choose what your Smith’s flavour of the day is.

They’re the perfect mixed snacks to bring along to your next outdoor activity or holiday gathering.

Our multipack offers the perfect school lunch snacks for even the pickiest eaters.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Wholegrain Snacks Made to Be Wholesome
The bite-sized, crunchy wholegrain snacks of Sunbites Grainwaves Chips Multipack of 8 Sour Cream & Chives 176g are a wholesome treat you can always look forward to. When you stock up on these sour cream and chives chips, not only do you get to taste a brilliant flavour combo, but you also get to enjoy the unique crunch of Grainwaves curvy chips. We fuel the good in ourselves by choosing wholesome snacks.

No Added Surprises
Sunbites Grainwaves prides itself on not hiding any hidden nasties in our wholegrain chips. Every chip is Australian-made to be as natural as possible. This means that not only are Sunbites chips suitable for vegetarians, but there are also no artificial flavours, no artificial colour, and no artificial preservatives.

Platter Up to Not Strike Out at Snack Time
The 8 portions of this multipack means it's easy to share around the delightful taste of sour cream and chives chips. Make them your home's go-to lunchbox snacks during the week, or as a convenient option when on the go. You can even save up the entirety of the multipack chips to platter up the next time you have friends over. After all, it's hard to resist any snack when it's served up so nicely.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Naturally Delicious

Made with only four simple, quality ingredients, Cobs Lightly Salted Slightly Sweet Popcorn contains no artificial flavors, colours, or preservatives. It's gluten-free, nut-free, vegetarian, vegan and contains wholegrain. Next time you need a light, crunchy, and naturally flavourful snack, reach for the popcorn that Aussies love.


Australian-Made

Cobs Lightly Salted & Slightly Sweet Popcorn is made right here in Australia using quality, locally sourced corn kernels. Popped to perfection in high oleic sunflower or canola oil, we create fluffy and crunchy popcorn. A light sprinkle of sea salt and a touch of raw sugar bring the perfect balance of sweet and savoury flavors—an iconic taste that has made this our most beloved snack.


The Perfect Snack for Every Occasion

Whether you're enjoying a backyard barbecue, packing school lunches, or settling in for a cozy movie night, Cobs Lightly Salted & Slightly Sweet Popcorn is the go-to snack. Its satisfying crunch and deliciously balanced flavour make it the perfect companion for road trips, picnics, and afternoon pick me-ups.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Lightly Salted, Authentic Mexican-Inspired FlavourTostitos Cantina Style Lightly Salted Corn Tortilla Chips deliver a golden crunch and a scrumptiously subtle, savoury flavour. Our crispy corn chips are inspired by authentic Mexican-inspired flavours that will transport your taste buds straight to our Cantina. Tostitos Lightly Salted Corn Chips are perfect when paired with an assortment of your favourite fresh toppings and they’re just as good straight out of the pack too! Tostitos tortilla chips are deliciously hearty, Mexican-style dippers that suit any occasion.

The Perfect Tortilla Chips for Toppings and Dips!
Finding the perfect snack bowl filler can be infuriating when your guests are just around the corner. About to crack? Your chips shouldn’t! All our irresistibly crunchy corn tortilla chips are built to take on all your favourite dips and toppings when snacking time comes around. Not sure where to start? We’ve popped our favourite Tostitos recipe on the back of every pack so you can pull out all the stops for a Mexican-style night at home. Whatever pairings you fancy, you can be sure that Tositos will stand the test of your favourite dip or topping.

Centrepiece of the Snack Table, Life of the Dinner Party
Our 175g share pack makes sure there’s more than enough to go around for everyone, no matter the occasion. Whether you’re filling the bowl for a Christmas Holiday family dinner, or laying out the ideal spread for a dinner party, give your guests their own base to build on. Share the love with our hearty dippers. Add a little variety to your party or lunch snacks and let your guests get to the good stuff!

The Couch Companion that Never Disappoints
If you’re looking for the perfect chip and dip combo for your late-night movie marathons, or just want a savoury snack to keep you company during TV time, Tostitos have you covered. Say Hola! to corn chips that can actually hold up to your favourite dips and TV shows. Our crispy, subtly savoury corn tortilla chips never disappoint! Better yet, Tostitos Lightly Salted Tortilla Corn Chips contain no added MSG and no artificial flavours or preservatives.

Tostitos Cantina Style Tortilla Corn Chips are the ideal dip and topping holders that actually hold up.

Our 175g share pack is the perfect size to add a little variety to your next Christmas Holiday gathering or dinner party.

No added MSG, artificial flavours or preservatives.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Red Rock Deli Potato Chips Lunchbox Snacks Assorted Multipack. It offers assorted flavours and a delectable crunch for lunchbox snacks. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Red Rock Deli Style Potato Chips Selection 10 generous packs. We begin with the finest potatoes harvested from Australian farms, roughly cut and slow-cooked for the most delectable crunch. With surprising twists, grinds and blends of carefully selected flavours, there's an enticing taste journey waiting to be discovered in every bite.

At The Red Rock Deli Chip Company we believe that variety is the spice of life...

Taking inspiration from the deli, we have created the Red Rock Deli tasting pack perfect for when you want to indulge. Here are a few of our favourites...

Our Honey Soy Chicken potato chips blend the sweetness of honey cut by the subtle richness of soy sauce.

Our Sweet Chilli & Sour Cream potato chips fuse the lingering sweet heat of chilli and paprika with a hint of smooth, tangy sour cream.

Our classic potato chips are seasoned with a grinding of Australia sea salt to enrich the natural potato taste.

Our Sea Salt & Balsamic Vinegar potato chips blend a grind of fresh sea salt with a generous splash of the sweet sharpness of balsamic vinegar.

For more information on Red Rock Deli please visit www.redrockdeli.com.au

Made in Australia with the finest potatoes harvested from Australian farms.

Made with natural colours and flavours.

Gluten-free potato chips made from natural ingredients.

Each chips’ package is a perfect portion-sized treat for a snack on the go.

Crowd-pleasing crisps to keep everybody satisfied at a picnic, as a school lunchbox snack or even as snack handouts during the Christmas holidays.
